title: Behavior Support Ideas
description: Draft positive support strategies and data ideas from observed patterns.
template: Based on this observed behavior pattern: {observedBehaviorPattern}, in this setting: {setting}, and suspected function (if known): {suspectedFunction}, provide 4-5 positive behavior support strategies and practical data-collection ideas. This is not a formal BIP or FBA. Never use a real student's name — write [Student] instead. This is a draft that requires review and approval by the full IEP team; do not make eligibility, placement, or disciplinary determinations.

fields.label: Observed behavior pattern
fields.placeholder: Describe patterns and triggers (no student names or identifying details).
